extraction.one_line_summary: DÉMARE Arnaud won a technical sprint in Messina after GROUPAMA-FDJ deliberately shed CAVENDISH Mark and EWAN Caleb on a 20km climb at 4%.
tactical_patterns: GROUPAMA-FDJ weaponized gentle 20km 4% climb to eliminate pure sprinters CAVENDISH and EWAN despite having domestiques available.
SWIFT Ben tactically stole intermediate sprint bonus seconds from GC riders, denying potential gains while out of contention.
SCOTSON Miles controlled critical final corner for DÉMARE, converting positioning advantage on technical downhill-to-headwind transition.
VAN DER POEL Mathieu boxed in final 200m despite ALPECIN-FENIX initiating elimination climb, revealing sprinter leadout limitations.

rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: positive: First win of season shows he can handle selective climbing while pure sprinters eliminated, dominates technical finishes.
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Dropped early on 4% 20km climb with only one domestique, confirms vulnerability on any sustained gradient.
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: Struggled worse than CAVENDISH on same climb with minimal team support, raising questions about form and team commitment.
rider_signals.GIRMAY Biniam: positive: Another top-five in reduced sprint despite ALPECIN-FENIX trying to shed sprinters, proving climbing resilience.
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: positive: Second place after surviving elimination climb confirms he's escaped pure-sprinter classification limitations.
rider_signals.NIZZOLO Giacomo: positive: Third after surviving selective climb shows he thrives when pure sprinters eliminated by tactical climbing.
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: Boxed and denied points despite team setting elimination tempo, suggests leadout execution problems.
rider_signals.SWIFT Ben: positive: Tactically sophisticated bonus second theft at intermediate sprint reveals race IQ beyond domestique role.
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: Reclaimed 2 bonus seconds at intermediate sprint, showing GC awareness on non-GC stage.
rider_signals.SCOTSON Miles: positive: Delivered DÉMARE perfectly by winning corner race 1km out, elite leadout positioning on technical circuits.
